name: Admin Workflows Suite — what ops admins actually ask
description: Replaces the COUNT-heavy academic shape suites. Tests REAL admin workflows: multi-table navigation, name-based search with fuzzy match, complaint/billing reports, drill-down, cross-entity analytics. Covers all 11 data-bearing tables and their FK relations (Customers↔Regions, Bills↔Customers↔ServiceTypes, Tickets↔ALL, Outages↔Region+Service+Dept, etc.). Uses REAL customer/region/service names from the live DB. Each expected scalar pre-computed via SQL on 2026-05-26.

Scenarios.Question: list users with their roles
show me tickets with their customer name
tickets with customer name and region
list all customers with their region
outages with service type, region and responsible department
bills with customer name and service type
show me bills for customer Houri
tickets opened by customer Mansour

customers in Damascus governorate

electricity meter readings for customer Houri

customers with more than 3 overdue bills
departments that resolved no tickets
electricity outages in Aleppo
how many customers have unpaid bills
customers whose tickets are all closed or resolved
give me a list of all overdue bills
top 10 highest-value invoices
